events.event_description: William Harrison Hornibrook presented credentials as Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary, nonresident (based in Tehran).

evidence.quote: William Harrison Hornibrook, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1935-01-22. Credentials presented: 1935-05-04. Left Tehran on 1936-03-16.

events.event_description: Legation Kabul opened, establishing a resident diplomatic mission in Afghanistan for the first time.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] During Dreyfus' tenure as non-resident Minister, and in the interval between Engert's appointment and his arrival at his post, Legation Kabul was opened on June 6, 1942.

events.event_description: Legation elevated to Embassy; Ely Eliot Palmer promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Ely Eliot Palmer, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1945-02-09. Credentials presented: 1945-12-06. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary on 1948-06-05.
[Mission Note] Embassy Kabul closed on January 30, 1989. The Liasion Office in Kabul opened on December 17, 2001. Embassy Kabul re-opened on January 17, 2002.

events.event_description: Liaison Office in Kabul opened, re-establishing a U.S. presence in Afghanistan after the embassy closure.

evidence.quote: [Mission Note] Embassy Kabul closed on January 30, 1989. The Liasion Office in Kabul opened on December 17, 2001. Embassy Kabul re-opened on January 17, 2002.
[Mission Note] Embassy Kabul closed on January 30, 1989. The Liasion Office in Kabul opened on December 17, 2001. Embassy Kabul re-opened on January 17, 2002.
